prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类高热推荐、电气/电子信息偏热，但该校农林类主体专业（食品科学、生物、动物科学等）社会 热度一般或偏冷；本省2026物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争加剧；省控线2025年436分，近年波动不大；华中农业大学位于湖北武 汉，属中部地区，在广东招生占比约3%（2025年广东招生114人/全国3581人），非本地高校，地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近4年后移约109 00名）、2026年扩招16.7%缓解竞争、本省物理类考生增加3.6%加剧竞争，以及学校层次稳定、声誉中性，在2025年基准39571名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约43728名 ，区间43228–44228名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28664 → 32992 → 31876 → 36198 → 39571, showing a continuous backward shift overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10,900 positions over the past 4 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 39571. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 58 in 2021–2022, 59 in 2023, 62 in 2024, and 54 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 63, an increase of about 16.7% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Ranking, it was approximately 45th in 2026 (47th in 2025), showing a slight rise in ranking, with overall stability. The 2026 reputation file does not record any significant events for this university, and there has been no obvious negative public opinion in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively popular), with moderate attention. No signs of a cutoff anomaly were found in historical admission records. It has A+ in Veterinary Medicine and Animal Husbandry, A in Crop Science and Aquaculture, and A- in Food Science and Engineering, totaling 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which attract some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science is highly popular, and Electrical/Electronic Information is relatively popular, but the university's main agricultural and forestry majors (Food Science, Biology, Animal Science, etc.) have generally average or low social popularity. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control score line was 436 in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with about 3% of its enrollment from Guangdong (114 Guangdong students out of 3,581 nationwide in 2025). It is not a local university, so the regional preference factor is neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift in historical rankings (about 10,900 positions over the past 4 years), the 16.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 alleviating competition, the 3.6% increase in provincial Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, and the stable university level with neutral reputation, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 39,571. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 43,728, with a range of 43,228–44,228.

- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 43,228–44,228, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 43,000), prioritize aiming for popular majors like Biological Sciences and Computer Science and Technology. If the ranking is close to the upper limit, mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 6418 → 6656 → 6822 → 7447 → 7600, showing a continuous backward shift overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1182 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 7600 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 10 students from 2021 to 2023, and 11 students from 2024 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 12 students, an increase of about 9.1% compared to 2025, a slight expansion.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 45th (47th in 2025), ranking slightly increased, overall level stable; the 2026 reputation file does not include significant events for this school, no obvious negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 54th (relatively hot), moderate attention; no signs of cutoff score breaks in historical enrollment anomaly records; Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquatic Products A, Food Science and Engineering A, a total of 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with about 3% of enrollment in Guangdong, not a local university, regional preference factor neutral; History Category enrollment majors (Sociology, Advertising, English, Business Administration, etc.) have differentiated social popularity: Law is relatively hot, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Teacher Training/Education divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged; the number of provincial History Category candidates in 2026 is about 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line in 2025 was 464 points, a significant increase from 428 points in 2024, reflecting overall intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings (backward shift of about 1182 places in the past 4 years), a slight alleviation from a 9.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, a significant 11.6% increase in provincial History Category candidates intensifying competition, and the rise in the provincial control line reflecting overall intensified competition, competition is expected to significantly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 7600; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8115, with a range of 7615–8615.
